我最初将tokyodev作为附带项目启动，当我首次启动它时，我从没想到广告发布职位可能受到法律的影响。但是，在日本，招聘是有执照的行业，因无执业而被判处最高一年的有期徒刑，并且根据工作委员会的运作方式，它可能被归类为招聘。
 最初，我的客户是小型创业公司，他们甚至都不知道许可要求。但是，由于我没有许可证，最终一家大公司的潜在客户被他们的法律团队阻止了。这促使我调查了在日本运营一个工作委员会对招聘许可的影响。
 幸运的是，就业安全局已经发布了指导方针，明确解决了提供工作委员会与招聘之间的区别。即使您是说日语的人，也不是最容易阅读的书。我在本文结尾处附上了粗略的英语翻译。
 要点是，因为tokyodev上的所有工作机会都是公开的，所以我不会征求特定个人的工作申请，并且申请无需经过我的任何筛选即直接提交给公司，我遵守了准则，因此不需要许可证。为了安全起见，我能够直接向就业安全局确认我的解释是正确的，并且我正在按照与指导方针一致的方式操作tokyodev。此外，我能够从他们那里得到一些较细微之处的澄清。
 使用tokyodev，有时我会向公司提供我域中的电子邮件地址，候选人可以在其中发送申请。依次将申请转发给公司。我确认这是允许的，只要我不更改电子邮件的内容或不筛选应用程序即可。我可以过滤掉任何垃圾邮件。
 我还确认，补偿方法与我是否需要许可证无关。无论我是要向公司收取固定费用以发布职位，还是像传统招聘人员一样收取成功聘用的费用，或者即使我要免费发布职位，在许可要求方面也没有什么不同。
 有时我仍然有公司询问我是否拥有许可证，但是由于我已经能够将它们指向指南，因此尽管没有许可证，但我仍可以继续前进。
日语准则的翻译如下。请注意，翻译工作是由该领域以外的专家完成的，因此不应仅仅依赖于概述指南。
  根据《就业保障法》第4-1条的规定，判断私人公司经营的在线工作站点是否被视为“就业安置”的准则确定如下。如果某人打算从事本指南中定义为“就业安置”的业务，则需要获得厚生劳动大臣的批准。每个项目都有一个特定的示例。
  1.《就业安全法》第4-1条将“就业安置”定义为“接受职位发布和工作申请，并鼓励招聘者与求职者之间达成就业协议。因此，仅提供招聘者和求职者信息，不接受工作申请或不鼓励就业协议的在线站点称为“信息提供者”，不被视为“就业安置”，需要经过合法批准。
 2.然而，最近，在互联网上提供招聘人员和求职者的信息的情况正在增加，其中一些人的角色已经从原来的“信息提供者”转变为不仅仅是浏览招聘者和求职者的信息的工具。 。这包括在招聘人员和求职者之间进行相互沟通，以及建立一种自动发送与招聘者的要求和/或求职者的资格相匹配的信息的方法。当然，并非所有人都被认为是“就业安置”，但是在某些情况下很难确定是否应将其视为“就业安置”。这就是创建这些准则的原因。
  I.这些准则旨在明确互联网上“招聘者和求职者的信息提供者”与“就业安置”的区别，以确保法律的适当执行。
 二。在这些准则中，“在互联网上提供招聘人员和求职者的信息”是指信息提供者允许招聘人员和求职者查看职位信息（两者都包括使人们能够识别个人招聘者或求职者的信息，例如公司名称和地址） （即求职者的姓名和地址，以下简称为“信息”）。此外，它还包括为求职者或招聘人员提供其他服务，例如提供一种方便的方式来创建和发送电子邮件以进行求职或招聘。
 三，如果在线招聘人员和求职者的信息提供者匹配以下1到3中的任一个，则将其视为就业安置。
没有预先设置客观和明确的搜索条件，信息提供者将选择和更改信息的内容或提供者。
  信息提供者将求职者信息告知求职者，或将求职者的信息告知求职者。 （示例2）
  当求职者和招聘者之间的通信通过信息提供商的主页进行中继时，它将更改通信的内容。 （示例3）
 IV。除III之外，根据信息提供者的广告内容和/或信息提供者与求职者或招聘者之间的合同的内容，如果信息提供者正在向求职者介绍求职者或向求职者介绍求职者，并提供求职者和互联网上的招聘人员是其中的一部分，总体上被认为是就业安置。 （示例4）
  尽管当信息提供者主动联系求职者或招聘者以鼓励应聘或招聘，调整工作面试时间表或提供其他信息时，虽然它被认为只是为了帮助招聘成功，但仍被视为就业安排。
 但是，即使所有这些都是在线进行的，也可以认为信息提供者和求职者或招聘者仅将电子邮件用作求职面试，电话，传真或邮件的替代通讯工具。因此，它不会影响判断它是否被视为就业安置。
  如果信息提供者允许求职者或招聘者通过其主页向求职者或求职者发送电子邮件以在线申请职位或直接招聘人员时，信息提供者仅提供必要的电子邮件地址而不更改通讯内容，则不是此外，关于电子邮件，当信息提供者具有允许求职者或招聘人员填写必要信息并创建电子邮件的特定表格时，也不视为工作安排。
如果信息提供者通过说“我们将找到您要寻找的工作”或“我们将介绍适合您公司的候选人”之类的内容来招聘求职者或招聘者，并提供潜在的招聘者或求职者信息，例如姓名和电话号码对于互联网上的求职者或招聘者，它被视为一个整体的就业机会。
note_en:
I started  tokyodev as a side project, and when I first launched it, it never occurred to me that there might be legal repercussions for advertising job postings. However, in Japan,  recruiting is a licensed industry, with criminal penalties of up to a year in prison for practicing without a license, and depending on how a job board is run, it may be classified as recruiting.
 Initially my clients were small startups, who weren't even aware of the licensing requirement. However, eventually a prospective client at a larger company was blocked by their legal team because I didn't have a license. This triggered me to investigate the implications of operating a job board in Japan with regards to recruitment licensing.
 Fortunately, the employment security bureau has released  guidelines that explicitly address the difference between providing a job board and recruitment. They aren't the easiest thing to read, even if you're a native Japanese speaker. I've included a rough  English translation at the end of this article.
 The gist of it is, because all the job opportunities on tokyodev are public, I don't solicit specific individuals to apply for jobs, and applications go directly to the companies without me doing any screening, I'm complying with the guidelines and thus don't need a license. Just to be safe, I was able to confirm directly with the employment security bureau that my interpretation is correct, and I'm operating tokyodev in a manner congruent with the guidelines. Furthermore, I was able to get some clarifications from them about some of the finer points.
 With tokyodev, I sometimes provide companies with an email address on my domain where candidates can send an application. Applications in turn get forwarded to the company. I confirmed that's allowed, so long as I don't change the contents of the emails or screen the applications. I am allowed to filter out any spam though.
 I also confirmed that the method of compensation is independent of whether or not I need a license. Whether I was to charge companies a flat fee to post a job, a fee upon successful hire like traditional recruiters do, or even if I was to post jobs for free, it wouldn't make a difference with regards to licensing requirements.
 I still sometimes have companies asking me if I have a license, but since I've been able to point them to the guidelines, I've been able to move forward with them despite not having one.
 Translation of  the Japanese guidelines follows. Please note that the translation was done by someone who's not an expert in the area, and so shouldn't be relied upon for more than getting an overview of the guidelines.
  Guidelines to judge whether or not an online job site run by a private company is deemed to be an “employment placement” prescribed by Article 4-1 of Employment Security Law are determined as follows. If a person is going to do a business defined as “employment placement” by these guidelines, he/she needs to be approved by Minister of Health, Labor and Welfare. Each item has a specific example.
  1. Article 4-1 of Employment Security Law defines “employment placement” as “to accept job posting and job application and to encourage employment agreement between recruiters and job seekers. Therefore, an online site which only provides information of recruiters and job seekers, and does not accept job applications nor encourage employment agreements is called “information provider” and is not deemed to be “employment placement” with need to be legitimately approved.
 2. However, recently, providing information of recruiters and job seekers on the internet has been increasing, and some of them have been changing their roles from just being “information providers” to something more than just enabling to browse information of recruiters and job seekers. This includes enabling mutual communications between recruiters and job seekers as well as establishing a way to automatically send information that matches recruiters’ requirements and/or job seekers’ qualifications. Of course, not all of them are deemed to be an “employment placement”, but there are some cases that are difficult to determine whether or not it should be deemed to be an “employment placement”. This is why these guidelines were created.
  I. These guidelines are to make clear the difference of “recruiters and job seekers’ information provider” and “employment placement” on the internet in order to secure adequate operation of the law.
 II. In these guidelines, “providing recruiters and job seekers’ information on the internet” means that an information provider allows recruiters and job seekers to view job information (both includes information that enables people to identify individual recruiter or job seeker such as company’s name and address, job seeker’s name and address, which will be called just “information” hereafter) on its homepage.Besides, it includes providing additional services for job seekers or recruiters, such as providing a convenient way to create and send emails for job application or recruitment.
 III. If an online recruiters’ and job seekers’ information provider matches either of following 1 to 3, it is deemed to be an employment placement.
 Without objective and explicit search criteria set in advance, information provider chooses and changes the contents of information or who it is providing.
  Information provider informs job seekers of job information, or inform recruiters of job seekers’ information. (Example 2)
  When communications between job seekers and recruiters are relayed via information provider’s homepage, it changes the contents for the communication. (Example 3)
 IV. Besides III, based on the contents of information provider’s advertisement, and/or the contents of contracts between information provider and job seekers or recruiters, if information provider is introducing job seekers to recruiters or recruiters to job seekers, and providing information of job seekers and recruiters on the internet is conducted as a part of it, it is overall deemed to be an employment placement. (Example 4)
  Although when information provider proactively contacts job seekers or recruiters to encourage applying or hiring, adjusts schedule for job interviews, or provides additional information, and it is considered just to assist recruitment successes, it is deemed to be an employment placement.
 However, even when all of these are conducted online, it is considered that information provider and job seekers or recruiters only use emails as a substitute communication tool for job interview, telephone, fax or mails. Therefore, it does not influence on judging whether or not it is deemed to be an employment placement.
  If information provider is only providing necessary email addresses without changing the contents of communications when information provider allows job seekers or recruiters to send emails to recruiters or job seekers via its homepage in order to apply for a job or recruit people directly online, it is not deemed to be an employment placement.Also, regarding the emails, when information provider has a specific form to allow job seekers or recruiters to fill in necessary information and create emails, it is not deemed to be an employment placement.
  If information provider recruits job seekers or recruiters by saying something like “we will find a job you are looking for” or “we will introduce candidates who will fit your company”, and provides potential recruiters or job seekers information such as names and phone numbers to job seekers or recruiters on the internet, it is deemed to be an employment placement as a whole.
title: 在日本经营职业介绍所可能会使您入狱
title_en: Running a job board in Japan can land you in prison

note:
Samya Stumo经过从华盛顿特区的长途飞行后，于2019年3月10日上午抵达埃塞俄比亚亚的斯亚贝巴的博乐国际机场。
 这位24岁的孩子在马萨诸塞州的一个农场长大，现在是她在全球医疗保健集团Thinkwell的首次海外任务。经过两个小时的停留，Stumo计划乘坐埃塞俄比亚航空302航班飞往肯尼亚内罗毕。
  与她同在的还有来自35个不同国家的148名其他乘客。许多人执行善意任务。埃塞俄比亚记者哈德拉·艾哈迈德（Hadra Ahmed）表示，一些人正前往内罗毕参加联合国会议。她说，其他人“将志愿服务，为世界做事。”
 起飞后仅六分钟，ETH302便全速驶入距离Bishoftu镇附近的Bole International 30英里处的一块田地。船上的每个人，包括Stumo，都死了。
 斯图莫的母亲纳迪亚·米勒隆说：“在凌晨3:00的英国广播公司上，它说一架从亚的斯亚贝巴起飞的埃塞俄比亚航空公司的飞机坠毁了，” “我记得我无法呼吸。”
  米勒隆说，她女儿的一些个人物品被追回并送回家庭，包括斯图莫的工作日记，护照和衣服。
 “所有气味都有喷气燃料。他们充满了气味，”米勒隆说。 “对我来说，这是死亡的味道。”
在埃塞俄比亚一个晴朗晴朗的早晨坠毁的飞机是一架波音737 MAX 8，这是一架新机型，已成为波音历史上销售最快的飞机。 737 MAX是波音极受欢迎的737飞机的改良版，具有增加的功率和省油的发动机。
  波音公司宣称MAX与之前的737非常相似，以至于飞行员无需在飞行模拟器中接受任何培训，这对航空公司来说是一笔昂贵的费用。波音公司表示，相反，飞行员可以通过查看56分钟的在线课程来加快使用新模型的速度。
 美国航空飞行员兼联合飞行员协会发言人丹尼斯·塔杰上尉说：“它通过机器人的声音描述了MAX的含义。” “您可以坐在星巴克[或]在家中，这会问您几个问题，以确认您的学习经验。”
  印尼廉价航空公司狮航（Lion Air）是波音公司最大的买家之一，以220亿美元的价格订购了200多架波音737 MAX 8。在2017年5月首飞之后，737 MAX 8连续飞行了17个月没有发生任何事故。然后，在2018年10月28日，从巴厘岛飞往雅加达的狮航610航班遇到了机上紧急事故，原因是飞机起飞后突然开始俯冲。
 “我们所有人都像在过山车中一样尖叫，”乘机乘客拉赫玛特·罗比（Rakhmat Robbi）说。 “说实话，我[想]这几乎就像我的最后一次飞行，这是我的最后一天。”
 印尼国家运输安全委员会（NTSC）称，由于飞行员努力重新获得控制权，飞机四次俯冲。恰好在驾驶舱内的第三名飞行员能够帮助两名飞行员解决情况，飞机安全降落在雅加达。但是，根据NTSC，机组人员未完整记录紧急情况的详细信息。
 NTSC高级安全调查员努沙西·乌托莫上尉说：“飞行员报告说，他在机长一侧表示的速度和高度存在问题。”
Nurcahyo说，机长没有提及飞机的修剪系统突然启动，导致其反复俯冲。
 航空律师史蒂文·马克斯（Steven Marks）说：“飞行员能够控制它。他们知道自己有问题。但是他们不完全了解问题的本质。”
 第二天清晨，2018年10月29日，同一架飞机从雅加达出发飞往印度尼西亚的邦加槟榔。起飞仅13分钟后，狮航610航班就坠入了爪哇海。
 当局立即展开了搜救任务，但船上所有189人死亡。
 12岁的大卫·莫雷诺（David Moreno）的母亲菲奥娜·阿尤（Fiona Ayu Zen）在飞机上飞行时说：“我祈祷能找到她……我为她的安全祈祷，但她没有做到。
   Lion Air 610的飞行数据记录器显示飞机失控了-它已经上下移动了24次，然后才最终全速驶入海中。
 Nurcahyo说：“我从来不知道……任何这样的飞机都会像这样上下飞行。” “我知道飞行员正在和飞机战斗。”
Nurcahyo说，NTSC向波音公司询问了737 MAX上可能导致这种行为的系统类型。他说，调查人员得知波音公司已经安装了一个飞行控制软件程序而感到惊讶，该程序可以迫使飞机在飞行员不知情的情况下进行俯冲。
 添加了称为机动特性增强系统（MCAS）的软件，以补偿已添加到现有737机身上的更大，更强大的发动机，从而改变了飞机的空中飞行特性。
 波音公司前工程师彼得·莱姆（Peter Lemme）表示：“这架飞机开始想自己全力以赴。”他没有参与MAX的设计，现在是Seamless Air Alliance的首席顾问。 “我们的想法是提供一些可以抵消俯仰力矩或使鼻子重新抬起的东西。”
  当飞机的计算机感觉到飞机有失速危险时，MCAS会触发位于飞机尾部的水平稳定器，将机头向后推，从而发挥作用。
 狮子航空的两次飞行均意外触发了MCAS，因为迎角缺陷（AOA）传感器发送了有关飞机机头位置的错误信息。尽管737 MAX上有两个AOA传感器，但MCAS仅连接到其中一个。
 航空记者克里斯汀·内格罗尼（Christine Negroni）说：“缺乏冗余在飞机设计上是我无法接受的，”《坠毁侦探》一书的作者。
  在狮航惨案发生后，波音公司首席执行官丹尼斯·缪伦堡（Dennis Muilenburg）向飞行公众保证了737 MAX 8的安全性。
“最重要的是，737 MAX的安全性和安全性对我们而言是波音公司的核心价值，”穆伦堡在2018年11月13日出席Fox Business时表示。
 波音公司随后向航空公司发布公告，指示飞行员在无指令的机头向下紧急情况下切断水平稳定器的电源，这也将阻止MCAS的启动。
 波音在一份声明中还指出，从巴厘岛飞往雅加达的Lion Air航班的飞行员能够成功降落，因为他们已正确执行了此程序。致命的狮航航班上的飞行员未能采取这一步骤。
 波音在与美国航空飞行员工会的秘密会晤中被工会主席秘密记录下来。波音表示，它决定不愿在737 MAX飞行手册中透露MCAS的存在。飞行员获得不必要的信息。
 “这激怒了我们，”塔杰上尉说。 “波音公司总是为您提供信息，但他们不会将其打包。”
  他补充说：“波音告诉飞行员，他们也不需要通知我们，因为如果MCAS开火失败，那看起来像是一场紧急事故，称为逃跑刺杀事件，我们可以及时做出反应。” “但是，他们无法识别出大量的错误警报，而当“刺刀修剪”以极快的速度逃跑时，这些警报会分散飞行员的注意力。”
 波音向飞行员工会保证，即使飞机继续在全球飞行，MCAS仍在进行软件修复。
狮航（Lion Air）航班坠毁仅四个月后，埃塞俄比亚航空（Ethiopian Airlines）302航班坠毁，因此，波音（Boeing）面对有关飞机及其MCAS系统的更新和严格审查。
 对ET302飞行数据记录器的分析表明，有故障的AOA传感器再次意外触发了MCAS，并使飞机俯冲。
 “驾驶舱录音机上听到的是什么，副驾驶说：‘加油！加油！ MCAS在踢飞机并俯冲前俯仰！”埃塞俄比亚航空记者凯耶苏斯·贝克尔（Kayeyesus Bekele）说。 “但是，要让他们控制飞机是如此困难，所以最后，它飞散在比斯霍夫图镇附近。”
  但是，注定要失败的狮航和埃塞俄比亚航空公司之间的主要区别是：埃塞俄比亚航空公司的飞行员知道MCAS的存在，并且他们按照波音的指示通过关闭控制水平稳定器的电动微调系统来禁用它。
 埃塞俄比亚航空飞行员无法手动控制飞机后，他们重新打开了电动护板，从而重新启动了MCAS。
 埃塞俄比亚运输部长达加马维特·莫格斯（Dagamawit Moges）在2019年4月4日的新闻发布会上说：“机组人员执行了制造商反复提供的所有程序，但无法控制飞机。”
  尽管各国在狮航坠机事故发生后继续允许737 MAX飞机飞行，但在埃塞俄比亚坠机事件发生后情况有所改变，世界各国都将所有737 MAX航班全部停飞。美国是最后一批禁止飞机飞行的国家之一。
在芝加哥的一次新闻发布会上，穆伦堡为两次坠机事故中的人员伤亡表示哀悼，但他再次为737 MAX的安全性辩护，并说将事故完全归咎于MCAS是不正确的。
 “没有一个项目；这是一连串的事件，”缪伦堡告诉记者。 “我们将MAX设计为具有飞行员所需的飞行质量。 MCAS系统是该设计工作的一部分。”
   埃塞俄比亚航空公司坠机受害者的家属对波音的反应感到愤怒。
 纳迪亚·米勒隆（Nadia Milleron）说：“他很抱歉我们失去了家人。” “他对造成他们的死亡不承担任何责任。”
  米勒隆，她的丈夫迈克尔·斯图莫（Michael Stumo）和其他受害者的家人发起了一项努力，要求波音对事故负责。
 15岁的阿曼·塔米拉特（Amen Tamirat）的父亲塔米拉特·穆鲁（Tamirat Mulu）死于埃塞俄比亚坠机事故，他说：“真正令我震惊的是他们的贪婪，他们如何敢于做自己做的事。 “我不知道他们晚上怎么还能睡觉。”
 超过100个受害者的家属对波音公司提起诉讼，称波音737 MAX的设计有缺陷，并且波音公司未对飞机发出警告。波音否认了这些指控。
起诉波音的律师之一，克利福德律师事务所的罗伯特·克利福德（Robert Clifford）说：“由于错误的原因，这将是最残酷，最刻意的努力，将产品保留在公共领域，”
 这些家庭还在华盛顿特区发起了第二次战线，争取参加国会对737 MAX丑闻的调查。
  Samya Stumo的父母拥有独特的能力来帮助领导这项工作。她的父亲曾代表小农场当过游说者，母亲则是传奇的消费者权益倡导者和前总统候选人拉尔夫·纳德（Ralph Nader）的侄女。
 纳德（Nader）从1960年代开始就着力于改善汽车安全性，并着眼于雪佛兰科尔维（Chevrolet Corvair），他在为这对夫妇提供建议方面发挥了重要作用。
 “我叔叔帮助我们提出了问题。 [他]对我们说了一些实际的事情，例如，“永远不要为员工安顿下来，总要去上层，”米勒隆说。
  众议院运输和基础设施委员会对波音737 MAX的开发进行了为期18个月的调查。俄勒冈州委员会主席众议员彼得·德法齐奥（Peter DeFazio）告诉美国广播公司新闻（ABC News），调查的目的是“找出飞机的缺陷是什么，以及监管系统如何使我们无法允许这些缺陷在飞机的制造中继续发展。”
 穆伦堡在2019年10月30日向内务委员会作证时，再次向遇难者家属道歉，受害人家属挤在听觉室里，举着亲人的标志。
当迪法齐奥问他这两次飞机失事的责任人时，穆伦堡回答：董事长，我和我公司都有责任。我们对飞机负责，我们知道我们需要改进。”
 听证会后不到两个月，梅伦堡辞去了波音公司的首席执行官一职，由曾在波音公司董事会任职的戴维·卡尔霍恩（David Calhoun）接任。
 在2020年9月16日发布的最终报告中，众议院调查得出的结论是，波音出于竞争原因已经危及了飞行公众的安全。
 调查发现了内部波音公司的电子邮件，该电子邮件表明一些员工对737 MAX仍在开发中时产生了担忧，并且他们也对公司的安全文化提出了质疑。
  美国联邦航空管理局（Federal Aviation Administration）于2020年11月18日宣布，它已清除737 MAX的再次飞行权限。
 波音公司说，它为飞机增加了许多保护措施，包括使MCAS对两个AOA传感器都做出响应，防止MCAS多次发射，并要求飞行员进行训练。
 波音在对“ 20/20”的声明中表示，“已经与政府和监管机构进行了全面合作，并且进行了一系列有意义的更改，以加强公司的安全实践和文化。”
“ 2020年11月18日，FAA解除了中止737-8和737-9的运行的命令。该机构的行动证实，通过批准的软件更新，额外的飞行员培训和其他定义的步骤，737家族的最新成员可以安全飞行，”波音的声明继续说道。 “我们对其安全性充满信心。”
 该公司对“ 20/20”的完整声明出现在本文的结尾。
  美国航空在其网站上列出了经过重新认证的737 MAX的首飞，该航班将于12月29日从迈阿密飞往纽约。
 一些航空专家认为，波音公司表示已经实施了修改，现在飞机可以安全飞行。
 “我确实认为737是一架安全的飞机。我很高兴乘坐737飞机。对此我没有任何问题，”莱姆说。 “这个MCAS的事情很糟糕，我认为信任，在这一点上很难恢复。”
 同时，受害者家属对737 MAX再次飞行感到愤怒。
 “我们俩都不会使用737 MAX，”米勒隆说着自己和她的丈夫。 “我们会警告我们认识的每个人，都要看他们正在飞行的设备，并确保他们不会在737 MAX上飞行。”
安全一直是波音的头等大事。我们将永远不会忘记狮航610和埃塞俄比亚航空302航班的346名遇难者及其家人。我们将密切注意从我们本章的历史中汲取的辛苦教训，以向他们表示敬意。
 波音与联邦航空局（FAA），全球监管机构和其他利益相关者紧密合作，实施了一些变革，以确保不会再发生此类事故。我们已经与政府和监管机构进行了全面合作，并且进行了一系列有意义的更改，以加强公司的安全规范和文化。
 2020年11月18日，FAA解除了中止737-8和737-9的运营的命令。该机构的行动证实，通过批准的软件更新，额外的飞行员培训和其他确定的步骤，737家族的最新成员可以安全飞行。美国联邦航空局局长史蒂夫·迪克森（Steve Dickson）将737 MAX描述为“历史上受审查最严格的运输机。”我们对其安全性充满信心。
 安全是我们行业成功的基础，每一次事故和未遂事故都为进一步提高飞行公众的安全性提供了机会。在过去的50年中，这种不断改进的旅程使民航业成为世界上最安全的运输方式。
 波音致力于恢复信任，我们将一次做到一架飞机。
note_en:
Samya Stumo arrived at Bole International Airport in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia, on the morning of March 10, 2019, after a long flight from Washington, D.C.
 The 24-year-old, who had been raised on a Massachusetts farm, was on her first overseas assignment for the global health care group, Thinkwell. After a two-hour layover, Stumo was scheduled to move on to Nairobi, Kenya, on Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302.
  Along with her were 148 other passengers from 35 different countries. Many were on missions of goodwill. Some were heading to Nairobi for a United Nations conference, according to Ethiopian journalist Hadra Ahmed. Others, she said, “were going to volunteer and do good for the world.”
 Just six minutes after takeoff,  ETH302 dove at full speed into a field 30 miles away from Bole International, near the town of Bishoftu. Everyone on board, including Stumo, was dead.
 “On the BBC at 3:00 in the morning, it said that a plane, Ethiopian Airlines taking off from Addis Ababa, had crashed,” said  Stumo’s mother Nadia Milleron. “I remember I couldn’t breathe.”
  Milleron said some of her daughter’s personal belongings were recovered and returned to the family, including Stumo’s work journal, passport and articles of clothing.
 “It all smells of jet fuel. They fill the room with the smell,” Milleron said. “To me, it’s the smell of death.”
  The plane that crashed on that clear, sunny morning in Ethiopia was a Boeing 737 MAX 8, a new model that had become the fastest-selling plane in Boeing's history. The 737 MAX was a revamped version of Boeing’s highly popular 737 aircraft, with added power and fuel-efficient engines.
  Boeing touted the MAX as being so similar to the previous model of the 737 that it said pilots wouldn’t be required to undergo any training for it in a flight simulator -- a costly expense for airlines. Instead, Boeing said pilots could get up to speed on the new model by reviewing a 56-minute online course.
 “It went through a robotic voice describing what the MAX is about,” said Capt. Dennis Tajer, an American Airlines pilot and spokesperson for the Allied Pilots Association. “You can sit at Starbucks [or] sit at home, and it would ask you a couple of questions to affirm the learning.”
  Indonesia-based budget airline Lion Air was one of Boeing’s biggest buyers, ordering over 200 Boeing 737 MAX 8s at a cost of $22 billion. And after its first flight in May 2017, the 737 MAX 8 went 17 months without incident. Then, on Oct. 28, 2018, Lion Air Flight 610 from Bali to Jakarta experienced an in-flight emergency as the plane suddenly began to nosedive after take-off.
 “All of us were screaming like we are in a roller coaster,” said Rakhmat Robbi, a passenger on the flight. “To be honest, I [was] think[ing] it’s almost like my last flight and this is my last day.”
 The aircraft nosedived four times as the pilots struggled to regain control, according to Indonesia’s National Transportation Safety Committee (NTSC). A third pilot who just happened to be in the cockpit was able to help the two pilots resolve the situation and the plane landed safely in Jakarta. However, according to the NTSC, the crew left incomplete notes about the details of the emergency.
 “The pilot reported that he had a problem with the speed and altitude indicated on [the] captain’s side,” said Capt. Nurcahyo Utomo, senior safety investigator of the NTSC.
  Nurcahyo said the captain failed to mention the plane’s trim system had suddenly activated, causing it to repeatedly nose dive.
 “The pilots were able to control it," said aviation attorney Steven Marks. “They knew they had a problem. But they didn’t understand exactly what the nature of the problem was.”
 Early the next morning, on Oct. 29, 2018, the same plane departed from Jakarta to Pangkal Pinang, Indonesia. Just 13 minutes after takeoff, Lion Air Flight 610 plummeted into the Java Sea.
 Authorities launched a search and rescue mission immediately, but all 189 people on board died.
 David Moreno, 12, whose mother Fiona Ayu Zen was on the flight, said “I prayed so she would be found... I prayed for her safety, but she didn’t make it.”
   The flight data recorder from Lion Air 610 revealed that the plane had gone out of control -- it had moved up and down over 24 times before it finally dove into the sea at full speed.
 “I never knew … any case of the [sic] aircraft that fly down and up and up and down like this,” Nurcahyo said. “I knew that the pilot was fighting with the plane.”
 Nurcahyo said the NTSC asked Boeing about the kind of system on the 737 MAX that could have caused it to behave in such a manner. He said investigators were surprised to learn that Boeing had installed a flight control software program that could force the plane into a dive without the pilots’ knowledge.
 The software, called Maneuvering Characteristics Augmentation System (MCAS), was added to compensate for the larger, more powerful engines that had been added onto the existing 737 airframes, which changed the in-air flight characteristics of the aircraft.
 “The aircraft starts to want to pitch up all by itself,” said Peter Lemme, a former Boeing engineer, who didn’t work on the MAX design, and now serves as chief consultant for Seamless Air Alliance. “The idea was to provide something that would offset that pitching moment, or causing the nose to come back up.”
  When the aircraft’s computer sensed that the plane was in danger of a stall, MCAS worked by triggering the horizontal stabilizer located on the aircraft’s tail to push the nose back down.
 MCAS was accidentally triggered on both Lion Air flights because a defective angle of attack (AOA) sensor had transmitted incorrect information about the position of the plane’s nose. Although there are two AOA sensors on the 737 MAX, MCAS was only connected to one of them.
 “It’s a lack of redundancy that appears to me to be unacceptable in airplane design,” said aviation journalist Christine Negroni, author of the book “The Crash Detectives.”
  In the wake of the Lion Air tragedy, then Boeing CEO Dennis Muilenburg reassured the flying public about the safety of the 737 MAX 8.
 “The bottom line here is the 737 MAX is safe and safety is a core value for us at Boeing,” Muilenburg said in a Nov. 13, 2018, appearance on Fox Business.
 Boeing followed up by issuing a bulletin to airlines instructing pilots to cut off power to the horizontal stabilizer in the event of an uncommanded nose-down emergency, which would also prevent MCAS from activating.
 Boeing also noted in a statement that the pilots on the Lion Air flight from Bali to Jakarta were able to successfully land because they had correctly followed this procedure. The pilots on the fatal Lion Air flight failed to take this step.
 In a private meeting with the pilots' union of American Airlines that was secretly recorded by the union’s president, Boeing said it had decided not to reveal the existence of MCAS in the 737 MAX flight manual on the grounds that it didn’t want to inundate pilots with unnecessary information.
 “That enraged us,” Capt. Tajer said. “Boeing always gives you the information, they don’t parcel it out.”
  “Boeing told pilots that they also didn’t feel the need to inform us because if [the] MCAS mis-fired, it would look like an emergency called Runaway Stab Trim, and that we could respond in time,” he added. “However, they failed to recognize the multitude of erroneous alerts that would be distracting pilots while the Stab Trim ran away at an extraordinary speed.”
 Boeing assured the pilots union that software fixes were in the works for MCAS, even as the aircraft continued to fly around the world.
  Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302 crashed just four months after the Lion Air flight went down, and in its wake, Boeing faced renewed and intense scrutiny about the aircraft and their MCAS system.
 An analysis of the ET302 flight data recorder revealed that once again, a defective AOA sensor had accidentally triggered MCAS and sent the plane into a nosedive.
 “What was heard on the cockpit voice recorder, the first officer saying, ‘Pitch up! Pitch up! Pitch up!’ while the MCAS was kicking and nosediving the aircraft,” said Ethiopian aviation journalist Kayeyesus Bekele. “But it was so difficult for them to keep the aircraft under control, so finally, it nosedived near Bishoftu town.”
  But there was one key difference between the doomed Lion Air and Ethiopian Airlines flights: the Ethiopian Airlines pilots had known MCAS existed and they had followed Boeing’s instructions to disable it by turning off the electric trim system that controlled the horizontal stabilizer.
 After the Ethiopian Airlines pilots were unable to control the plane manually, they turned the electric trim back on, which reactivated MCAS.
 “The crew performed all the procedures repeatedly provided by the manufacturer, but was not able to control the aircraft,” said Dagamawit Moges, Ethiopia’s minister of transport, in a press conference on April 4, 2019.
  While countries continued to allow the 737 MAX planes to fly after the Lion Air crash, that changed after the Ethiopian crash, and countries around the world grounded all 737 MAX flights. The United States was one of the last countries to prohibit the aircraft from flying.
 During a press conference in Chicago, Muilenburg expressed sorrow for the loss of life in the two crashes, but he again defended the safety of the 737 MAX and said it was incorrect to solely blame MCAS for the crashes.
 “There is no single item; it’s a chain of events,” Muilenburg told reporters. “We’ve designed the MAX to have the flying qualities desired in the hands of the pilots. The MCAS system is part of that design effort.”
   The families of the Ethiopian Airlines crash victims were furious with Boeing’s response.
 “He’s sorry that we lost our family members,” said Nadia Milleron. “He doesn’t take any accountability for causing their deaths.”
  Milleron, her husband Michael Stumo and other victims’ family members launched an effort to hold Boeing accountable for the accidents.
 “What really shocks me is their greed, how they have the audacity to do what they’re doing,” said 15-year-old Amen Tamirat, whose father, Tamirat Mulu, died in the Ethiopian crash. “I don’t know how they can still sleep at night.”
 Over 100 victims’ families filed a lawsuit against Boeing, alleging that the 737 MAX had a defective design and that Boeing issued an inadequate warning about the aircraft. Boeing has denied the allegations.
 “This is going to go down as one of the most callous, deliberate efforts to keep a product in the public domain for the wrong reasons,” said Robert Clifford, of Clifford Law Offices, who is one of the attorneys suing Boeing.
 The families also launched a second front in Washington, D.C., fighting to be part of a congressional investigation into the 737 MAX scandal.
  Samya Stumo’s parents were uniquely equipped to help lead this effort. Her father had worked as a lobbyist on behalf of small farms, and her mother was the niece of legendary consumer advocate and former presidential candidate Ralph Nader.
 Nader, who led the fight to improve automotive safety starting in the 1960’s with a focus on the Chevrolet Corvair, was instrumental in advising the couple.
 “My uncle helped us frame questions. [He] said to us practical things, like, ‘Never settle for staff, always go to the top,’” said Milleron.
  The House Committee on Transportation and Infrastructure launched an 18-month-long investigation into Boeing’s development of the 737 MAX. Committee Chair Rep. Peter DeFazio, D-Oregon, told ABC News the investigation was to “find out what the defects of the plane were and how the regulatory system failed us in allowing those defects to go forward in the manufacturing of the plane.”
 During his testimony before the House Committee on Oct. 30, 2019, Muilenburg again apologized to the victims’ families, who crowded the hearing room holding up signs with images of their loved ones.
   When Defazio asked him who bore responsibility for the two plane crashes, Muilenburg responded: “Mr. Chairman, my company and I are responsible. We are responsible for our airplanes, and we know there are things we need to improve.”
 Less than two months after the hearing, Muilenburg resigned as CEO of Boeing and was replaced by David Calhoun, who had served on Boeing’s board of directors.
 In its final report, released Sept. 16, 2020, the House investigation concluded that Boeing had placed the safety of the flying public in jeopardy for competitive reasons.
 The investigation uncovered internal Boeing emails that showed some employees had raised concerns about the 737 MAX while it was still in development, and that they had questioned the safety culture of the company as well.
  The Federal Aviation Administration announced on Nov. 18, 2020, that it had cleared the 737 MAX to fly again.
 Boeing said it added a number of safeguards to the plane, including making MCAS responsive to both AOA sensors, preventing MCAS from firing more than once and requiring pilot simulator training.
 In a statement to "20/20," Boeing said it had "cooperated fully with government and regulatory reviews and also have made a series of meaningful changes to strengthen our company’s safety practices and culture.”
 "On November 18, 2020, the FAA lifted the order that suspended operation of 737-8s and 737-9s. The agency’s action validated that with the approved software update, additional pilot training and other defined steps, the newest member of the 737 family is safe and ready to fly," Boeing's statement continued. "We have full confidence in its safety."
 The company’s full statement to “20/20” appears at the end of this article.
  On its website, American Airlines listed the first flight of the re-certified 737 MAX, which will go from Miami to New York City on Dec. 29.
 Some aviation experts believe the aircraft is now safe to fly with the modifications Boeing says it has implemented.
 “I do think the 737 is a safe plane. I'm happy to fly on the 737. I have no issue about that,” Lemme said. “This MCAS thing was bad, and I think that trust, it's going to be really hard to get back at this point.”
 Meanwhile, the families of the victims are outraged that the 737 MAX will fly again.
 “Neither of us would ever get on a 737 MAX,” said Milleron, speaking for herself and her husband. “We will warn every single person we know to look at the equipment that they are flying on and make sure that they don't fly on a 737 MAX.”
   Safety is and always has been Boeing’s top priority. We will never forget the 346 victims of the Lion Air Flight 610 and Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302 accidents, as well as their families. We will honor them by holding close the hard lessons learned from this chapter in our history.
 Working closely with the Federal Aviation Administration (FAA), global regulators and other stakeholders, Boeing has implemented changes that ensure accidents like these will never happen again. We have cooperated fully with government and regulatory reviews and also have made a series of meaningful changes to strengthen our company’s safety practices and culture.
 On November 18, 2020, the FAA lifted the order that suspended operation of 737-8s and 737-9s. The agency’s action validated that with the approved software update, additional pilot training and other defined steps, the newest member of the 737 family is safe and ready to fly. FAA Administrator Steve Dickson has described the 737 MAX as “the most heavily scrutinized transport aircraft in history.” We have full confidence in its safety.
 Safety is fundamental to the success of our industry, and every accident and near-miss provides an opportunity to further improve safety for the flying public. Over the past 50 years, this journey of continuous improvement has made commercial aviation the world’s safest form of transportation.
 Boeing is committed to restore trust, and we’ll do it one airplane at a time.
title: 狮航的波音737 Max飞机在2018年致命坠毁的前一天经历了坠机事故
title_en: Lion Air's Boeing 737 Max Experienced a Near-Crash The Day Before 2018's Fatal Crash

note:
他决心要制造一台计算机……但是，由于他承担着全部教学职责，他几乎没有时间专注于这个问题。最终，在1937年末一个寒冷的冬天夜晚，他再也忍受不了了。他不得不离开去专心。因此，他跳入爱荷华州埃姆斯市的汽车，以每小时80英里的速度向东行驶至零下温度。大约三个小时后，他穿过密西西比河进入伊利诺伊州后，在一家路边的小屋停下来进行热身。在他的第一波本威士忌和第二波本威士忌之间的某个地方，他构思了四个使计算机工作的关键构想。”
 难以置信！阿塔纳索夫（Atanasoff）很忙，但最终还是去做他真正喜欢的事情，全世界都认可他的天才，并且他获得了完成工作所需的全部资源。
 至少，这就是任何一个合理的社会都会发生的情况。相反，我们被告知：
 Atanasoff并没有进一步发展他的发明。美国参战后不久，1941年12月，他去了华盛顿特区的海军条例实验室，在那里他负责监督地雷的计数测试。他再也没有回到计算领域。
 谁知道他还能给我们什么？取而代之的是，他的整个一生都产生了一个短暂的真正的科学生产力，并通过讲授职责和战争而受到重视。
 一旦开始寻找，这些故事无处不在。这是有关Unix发明的守护进程，牛羚和企鹅：
 1969年8月，肯·汤普森（Ken Thompson）的妻子邦妮（Bonnie）带大儿子到加利福尼亚旅行，向家人炫耀。作为一个临时的单身汉，肯有时间工作。 “我分别为操作系统，shell，编辑器和汇编器分配了一个星期的时间（[他告诉我]………而在她离开的那个月中，它被完全重写为看起来像操作系统的形式”）
也许这是一个大大夸大的神话，但是如果那是真的，那会是多么恐怖呢？汤普森是否有可能一生都负有责任，然后在短暂的自由中做了一些最重要的工作？
  ……威尔伯再也没有飞过。他逐渐开始为赖特公司（Wright Company）处理业务事务，并处理各种诉讼。在处理了专利诉讼之后，威伯给两兄弟带来了极大的压力，威尔伯在给法国朋友的一封信中写道：“当我们认为如果我们能够将这段时间投入到实验中，我们可能会取得的成就，我们感到很难过，但与人交往总是比与人交往更容易，而且没有人能够像他所选择的那样完全地指导自己的生活。”
 但是为什么不是呢？如今被誉为历史上最伟大的投资者之一的威尔伯·赖特（Wilbur Wright）为什么没有时间继续他最重要的工作呢？故事继续：
 威尔伯（Wilbur）于去世前的第二年度过，在欧洲度过了整整六个月的时间，处理各种商业和法律事务……他还在纽约，华盛顿和代顿之间不断往返。所有的压力都对威尔伯造成了巨大的伤害。奥维尔（Orville）表示，他会“回家变白”。
  在1912年5月上旬回到Dayton之后，他身心都疲惫不堪，再次病倒并被诊断出伤寒。他坚持不懈，症状反复发作并缓解了好几天。威尔伯于5月30日在赖特一家家中去世，享年45岁。
 这些是我们拥有的最杰出的思想，他们几乎都无法发挥自己的潜力中的一小部分。我们应该问他们每个人可以完成多少事情，还要问那些可能失去甚至一个月的真正空闲时间来追求梦想的发明家所蒙受的损失。当然，由于贫困或歧视，有多少人被有效禁止从事研究。
 最令我震惊的不是物质损失，而是人类精神的浪费。正如Bret Victor曾经解释的那样：
我们认识到，必须允许狗完全自由表达其全部功能。将他关在笼子里或限制他的经验范围，并不是让他做狗可以做的所有事情。这正是我们对自己所做的。
 因此，以上故事使我震惊的不只是悲剧，而是更不人道的事情。
 我最大的担心是，聪明的生活会来到人间。这不会是入侵，殖民或任何可怕的事情。他们只会让我们坐下，并询问我们英雄的生活。
 我们会很自豪地向他们介绍这个家伙Wilbur Wright。他和他的兄弟如何发明机器像神一样在天上飞。我们将向他们介绍我们的研究和创新文化，以及来自俄亥俄州的自学成才的工程师Wilbur如何改变了整个世界。
  不是用棍子和石头，而是用专利诉讼的弹幕。我们将不得不告诉外星人，多年来，我们如何利用这种社会上合法的酷刑的伟大制度，慢慢地使他丧命。
 我们将告诉他们，可怜的辉煌威尔伯最终是如何变老又累又无法再生产出任何美丽的东西的。
 我认为他们不会原谅我们。我不确定我们是否应该原谅自己。
是的，我知道威尔伯也起诉了人们。我并不是在说他是一个好人。我的观点是，在人性化的世界中，这个故事的任何部分都不可能实现。
note_en:
He was determined to build a computing machine… But with all his teaching responsibilities, he’d had very little time to focus on the problem. Finally, however, on a bitterly cold winter night in late 1937, he just couldn’t take it anymore; he had to get away to concentrate. So he jumped into his car in Ames, Iowa, and drove east through the subzero temperature at more than eighty miles per hour. Almost three hours later, after he crossed the Mississippi River into Illinois, he stopped at a roadhouse to warm up. And there, somewhere between his first and second bourbons, he conceived four crucial ideas to make him computer work.”
 Incredible! Atanasoff was busy, but finally got down to doing the thing he really loved, the world recognized his genius, and he was given all the resources he needed to complete his work.
 At least, that’s what would have happened in any reasonable society. Instead, we’re told:
 Atanasoff didn’t develop his invention any further, as it happened. Soon after the United States entered the war, in December 1941, he went to the Naval Ordinance Laboratory in Washington, D.C., where he supervised the counting testing of mines.  He never returned to computing.
 Who knows what else he could have given us? Instead, his entire lifetime produces one brief period of real scientific producitivity, bookended by teaching responsibilities and war.
 Once you start looking, these stories are everwhere. Here’s  The Daemon, the Gnu and the Penguin on the invention of Unix:
 In August 1969, Ken Thompson’s wife Bonnie took their year-old son on a trip to California to show off to their families. As a temporary bachelor, Ken had time to work. “I allocated a week each to the operating system, the shell, the editor and the assembler [he told me]… and during the month she was gone, it was totally rewritten in a form that looked like an operating system”
 Maybe this is a greatly exaggerated myth, but how terrifying would it be if that was true? Is it possible that Thompson was burdened by responsibilities his entire life, and then in a brief moment of freedom did some of the most important work anyone has ever done?
  …Wilbur never flew again. He gradually became occupied with business matters for the Wright Company and dealing with different lawsuits. Upon dealing with the patent lawsuits, which had put great strain on both brothers, Wilbur had written in a letter to a French friend, “ When we think what we might have accomplished if we had been able to devote this time to experiments, we feel very sad, but it is always easier to deal with things than with men, and no one can direct his life entirely as he would choose.”
 But why on earth not? Why couldn’t Wilbur Wright, now admired as one of history’s greatest investors, find time to continue his most important work? The story continues:
 Wilbur spent the next year before his death traveling, where he spent a full six months in Europe attending to various business and legal matters… He was also constantly back and forth between New York, Washington and Dayton. All of the stresses were taking a toll on Wilbur physically. Orville would remark that he would “come home white”.
  After returning to Dayton in early May 1912, worn down in mind and body, he fell ill again and was diagnosed with typhoid fever. He lingered on, his symptoms relapsing and remitting for many days. Wilbur died, at age 45, at the Wright family home on May 30.
 These were some of the most brilliant minds we had, and they were each nearly unable to fulfil even a tiny fraction of their potential. We should ask how much more each of them could have accomplished, but also how much we’ve lost from would-be inventors unable to find even a month of genuine free time with which to pursue their dreams. And of course, how many have been effectively barred from research by poverty or discrimination.
 What hits me hardest is not the material loss, but the squandering of human spirit. As  Bret Victor once explained:
 We recognize that a dog has to be allowed the full free expression of its entire range of capabilities. Sticking him in a cage or constraining his range of experience, you’re not letting him do all the things that dogs can do. And this is exactly what we’ve done to ourselves.
 And so the stories above strike me not even as tragedies, but as something more inhumane.
 My greatest fear is that intelligent life will arrive on earth. It won’t be an invasion, or colonization, or anything horrible. They’ll just sit us down, and ask about the lives of our heroes.
 We’ll proudly tell them about this guy Wilbur Wright. How he and his brother invented a machine to fly in the sky as gods. We’ll tell them about our culture of research and innovation, and how Wilbur, self-taught engineer from Ohio, changed the entire world.
  Not with sticks and stones, but with a barrage of patent lawsuits. We will have to tell the aliens how we used this great system of socially legitimate torture to slowly wear him down over the years.
 We will tell them how in the end, poor brilliant Wilbur became old and tired and incapable of producing anything beautiful ever again.
 I do not think they will forgive us. I am not sure we should forgive ourselves.
    Yes, I understand that Wilbur also sued people. I’m not claiming that he was a good person. My point is that in a humane world, no part of this story would even be possible.
title: 威尔伯·赖特谋杀案

note:
“科学不仅与灵性相容；它是灵性的深刻来源。当我们在光明的岁月和岁月的流逝中认清自己的位置时，当我们把握生活的错综复杂，美丽和微妙时，那种高涨的感觉，那种兴高采烈和谦卑的感觉肯定是精神上的。” –卡尔·萨根（Carl Sagan），《恶魔困扰的世界》。
 正如萨根（Sagan）所描述的那样，了解宇宙后，我感受到了精神上的瞬间，因为我更好地理解了自己与更广泛事物的联系。就像当我第一次得知我是由星辰的灰烬组成时一样–体内的原子通过超新星扩散到永恒的以太中。另一个精神时刻是第一次看到此图像：
   大脑中的神经元，并列有星系团及其相连的物质和暗物质细丝。相似之处显而易见。暗示？您的脑海中可能有整个宇宙。但是图像之间的相似性可能只是单音不佳的情况-感觉到实际上并不存在相似性。毕竟，考虑到两者之间的巨大差异，这两件事如何相似？但是，如果超出大脑神经元网络和宇宙星系网之间的视觉相似性，那么客观的测量可以比较它们真正相似的程度呢？这就是Franco Vazza（博洛尼亚大学的天体物理学家）和Alberto Feletti（维罗纳大学的神经外科医生）着手发现这两种学科的结合，从而在“物理学前沿”上发表的。
   人脑实际上是宇宙中已知的最复杂的结构之一，它本身是所有复杂性中最大的。您的大脑大约有800亿个神经元，这些神经元处理来自感官的输入，并通过神经系统向您的身体发送信号。神经元也可以联网，通过称为轴突和树突的连接相互交流。构成您的自我的神经网络的神经元之间有大约100万亿个连接。
  宇宙也是联网的。尽管我们可能将空间视为被大量……很好的……空间隔开的物体，但事实并非完全如此。我们用科学设备看到的宇宙被称为“可观察到的宇宙”，其直径约为900亿光年，包含数千亿至几万亿个星系。这些银河系就像我们的银河系一样，聚集了数十亿颗恒星，它们本身也被分组为银河系星团。我们的银河系是“本地群”的一部分，“本地群”包含邻近的仙女座星系和三角星系以及其他50个星系。这些星系反过来又是称为处女座超级集群的更大星系的一部分。群体和簇之间的空间不是空的，而是主机连接的普通和暗物质的细丝，它们延伸了数百万光年。这样，宇宙可以被认为是一个巨大的银河星团网络，它们都与大脑中的神经网络相似地互连。该网络称为Cosmic Web。
    寻找两个网络之间可量化相似性的研究源于神经科学与天体物理学之间的合作。 Vazz和Feletti使用这两个学科的技术和工具，对这两个网络进行了研究，以发现可感知的视觉相似性以外的可量化相似性。这些网络是否具有可比性？如果是，那意味着什么？
 研究人员使用了4微米厚的人体皮质切片-大脑的外层，负责处理语言，感官信息，思想，记忆和意识。将这些与从计算机模拟的100万立方兆空间的体积中提取的25兆帕（1帕秒=约3.26光年）厚的宇宙“切片”进行了比较。假设两者的大小相差27个数量级，则大脑和宇宙的厚度相对可比。
根据切片的比例，对切片进行了检查-结构上的相似性并不总是很明显。但是在大脑组织中放大40倍时，研究人员开始发现结构上的相似之处。 40倍的放大倍数表示大脑的比例为0.01-1.6mm，宇宙的比例为1-100兆秒。在这里，神经网络看起来像银河星团。此外，可以使用两种技术客观地测量和比较网络的相似性。第一个是“网络度中心度”，它测量给定网络中网络连接的长度和连接度。神经元的核或中心的半径比连接的轴和树突的长度小得多。同样，银河星团的半径比连接细丝的长度小得多。客观比较两个网络的第二种方法是“聚类系数”，它量化与每个连接节点（神经元或星系团）相邻的结构量，并将该结构与网络中的随机点进行比较。这种比较将两个网络的组织性与随机性进行了对比。
   在这些规模上运用这些技术，瓦兹和费莱蒂发现大脑和宇宙之间存在“显着”相似之处。他们还发现，网络比其他生物和物理结构（包括树枝，云形成的动力学或水的湍流）彼此更相似。这些其他结构本质上是分形的。分形模式是可重复的，并且无论您观察到什么比例，它们的外观都相同。相比之下，从小到大，宇宙看起来完全不同。星系和太阳系与它们创建的宇宙网不同。因此，以不同的比例观察时，大脑也不再类似于神经网络。规模本身对于这些结构的组织方式可能很重要。
 研究人员总结了他们的发现“暗示着这样一个事实，即尽管这两个系统的空间规模存在巨大差异，但完全不同的物理过程之间的相互作用可能会产生相似的网络配置，从而导致相似程度的复杂性和自组织。”换句话说，像大脑和宇宙之类的网络可能共享相似的结构，而它们的大小完全不同，并由不同的过程（重力与生物学）形成。但是，有可能导致某些事物以相似的方式发展和成长。
   研究人员注意到大脑和宇宙网之间还有两个有趣的相似之处。首先是组成比。大脑的水含量为77％，而类似的宇宙网的暗能量约为73％。水和暗能量不是网络本身的一部分，而是被视为“被动材料”或被动能量。被动材料/能量的存在和比例可能与这些网络的形成方式有关。第二个令人着迷的相似之处是，映射模拟的Universe模型所需的计算机数据量可与人脑的理论内存存储限制相媲美。需要1到10 Petabyes（1 Petabyte = 1000 Terrabytes）的数据，以在宇宙网变得明显的尺度上模拟可观测宇宙的演化。人脑的总存储容量估计约为2.5 PB。从理论上讲，人类可以在大脑内部存储可观察到的宇宙结构的很大一部分。或者，甚至更令人惊讶的是，Cosmic Web在理论上可以存储一生的人类经验数据。
  除了相似之外，宇宙网和大脑之间也存在差异。尽管使用的大脑样本来自皮层，但整个大脑并不均匀。大脑的不同部分具有不同的用途，而宇宙的关键特征是它在几乎所有方向上的均一性。大脑中神经元之间的链接用于感官信息的传输，而宇宙中的链接则仅传输能量和物质。 Vazz和Feletti希望他们的研究将启发更强大的算法的开发，以发现大脑与宇宙之间的更多相似之处。也许我们将了解导致完全不同的过程所产生的两个网络如此相似的情况。
 我们听说卡尔·萨根（Carl Sagan）描述了我们的身体是如何由恒星组成的。现在我们开始理解我们的大脑也可能像它们一样被构图。在您的脑海中，存在着一个连接的整个宇宙–一个宇宙内部的一个宇宙–一个能够与另一个产生这种联系的人建立联系。数十亿个神经元接触数十亿颗星-肯定是属灵的。
note_en:
“Science is not only compatible with spirituality; it is a profound source of spirituality. When we recognize our place in an immensity of light years and in the passage of ages, when we grasp the intricacy, beauty and subtlety of life, then that soaring feeling, that sense of elation and humility combined, is surely spiritual.” – Carl Sagan  “The Demon-Haunted World.”
 Learning about the Universe, I’ve felt spiritual moments, as Sagan describes them, as I better understand my connection to the wider everything. Like when I first learned that I was literally made of the ashes of the stars – the atoms in my body spread into the eternal ether by supernovae. Another spiritual moment was seeing this image for the first time:
   A neuron in the brain juxtaposed with clusters of galaxies and their connected filaments of matter and dark matter. The resemblance is immediately clear. The implication? You may have an entire universe in your head. But the similarity between the images could simply be a case of  apophenia – perceiving likeness where none actually exists. After all, how can these two things be similar given the vast difference in scale between them? But what if beyond the visual similarity between the networks of neurons in the brain and webs of galaxies in the Cosmos, an objective measurement could compare just how similar they truly are? That’s what Franco Vazza (astrophysicist at the University of Bologna) and Alberto Feletti (neurosurgeon at the University of Verona) set out to discover combining both their disciplines for a publication in  “Frontiers of Physics.”
   The human brain is literally one of the most complex structures known in the Universe – which is itself the greatest of all complexity. Your brain has about 80 billion neurons – the cells that process input from the senses and send signals to your body through the nervous system. Neurons are also networked, communicating to each other through connections called axions and dendrites. There are on the order of 100 trillion connections between neurons forming the neural network that creates who you are.
  The Universe is networked as well. While we may think of space as objects separated by vast tracts of…well…space, that’s not entirely the case. The Universe we see with our scientific equipment is referred to as the “Observable Universe” approximately 90 BILLION light years in diameter and containing on the order of hundreds of billions to a few trillion galaxies. These galaxies, like our Milky Way, collections of billions of stars, are themselves grouped into galaxy clusters. Our Milky Way is part of the “Local Group” which contains the neighbouring Andromeda and Triangulum galaxies as well as 50 other galaxies. Those galaxies are in turn part of a larger group called the Virgo Supercluster. The space between groups and clusters is not empty but rather hosts connecting filaments of both ordinary and  dark matter that stretch for millions of light years. In this way, the Universe can be thought of as a giant network of galaxy clusters all interconnected similarly to neural networks in the brain. That network is called the  Cosmic Web.
    The research to find quantifiable similarities between both networks was born in a partnership between neuroscience and astrophysics. Using techniques and tools from both disciplines, Vazz and Feletti looked at these two networks to find quantifiable similarities beyond the perceived visual similarity. Were these networks comparable and, if so, what does that mean?
 The researchers used 4 micrometer thick slices of the human cortex – the outer layer of the brain which is responsible for processing language, sensory information, thought, memory, and consciousness. These were compared to 25 megaparsec (1 parsec = approx. 3.26 light years) thick “slices” of Universe taken from a computer simulated volume of 1 million cubic megaparsecs of space. The slices of brain and Universe are relatively comparable in thickness then given that both are   27 orders of magnitude in size different from each other.
    Depending on the scale the slices were examined – the similarity in structure wasn’t always apparent. But at 40x magnification in the brain tissue, the researchers began to see similarities in structure. 40x magnification represents a scale of 0.01-1.6mm in the brain and 1-100 megaparsecs in the Universe. Here, the neuronal network appears like the galaxy clusters. Furthermore, the similarity of the networks can be objectively measured and compared using two techniques. The first is “network degree centrality” which measures the lengths of the network connections and degree of connectivity in a given network.  The nucleus or centre of a neuron is much smaller in radius than the length of connecting axions and dendrites. Similarly, galaxy clusters are much smaller in radius than the length of connecting filaments. The second method to objectively compare both networks is the “clustering coefficient” which quantifies the amount of structure adjacent to each connection node (neuron or galaxy cluster) and compares that structure to a random point within the network. This comparison contrasts organization vs randomness in both networks.
   Applying the techniques at these scales, Vazz and Feletti found “remarkable” similarities between both the brain and the Universe. They also found that the networks were more like each other than other biological and physical structures including tree branches, the dynamics of cloud formation, or water turbulence. These other structures are fractal in nature. Fractal patterns are self-repeating and look the same regardless of what scale you observe them. By contrast, the Universe looks completely different at smaller than larger scales. Galaxies and solar systems don’t resemble the Cosmic Web that they create. So too the brain no longer resembles the neural network when observed at different scales.  Scale itself might be important to the creation of these structures in terms of how they organize themselves.
 The researchers conclude their findings  “hint at the fact that similar network configurations can emerge from the interaction of entirely different physical processes, resulting in similar levels of complexity and self-organization, despite the dramatic disparity in spatial scales of these two systems.” In other words, networks like the brain and the Universe may share similar structure while being completely different in size and formed by different processes (gravity vs biology). Yet it’s possible something caused both to evolve and grow in a similar way.
   The researchers noted two other interesting similarities between the brain and the Cosmic Web. The first was ratios of composition. The brain is 77% water while similarly the Cosmic Web is approximately 73%  dark energy. Water and dark energy are not a part of the network itself but are considered “passive material” or passive energy. The presence and ratio of passive material/energy might be of relevance to how these networks form. A second fascinating similarity is that the amount of computer data required to map the simulated Universe models is comparable to the theoretical memory storage limits of the human brain. Between 1-10 Petabyes (1 Petabyte = 1000 Terrabytes) of data is needed to simulate the evolution of the observable Universe at scales where the Cosmic Web becomes apparent. Estimates on the  total storage capacity of the human brain is about 2.5 Petabytes. A human could then theoretically store a good portion of the observable Universe’s structure…inside their brain. Or, even more astonishing to consider, the Cosmic Web could theoretically store the data of a lifetime of human experiences.
  As well as similarities, there are differences between the Cosmic Web and the brain. While the samples of brain used were from the cortex, the whole brain is not uniform. Different parts of the brain are structured for different purposes while a key feature of the Universe is its uniformity in nearly all directions. Links between neurons in the brain are for the transmission of sensory information while links in the Universe transmit energy and matter alone. Vazz and Feletti hope their research will inspire  the development of more powerful algorithms to discover even more similarities between the brain and the Universe.  Perhaps we’ll learn about the conditions that cause two networks born out of completely different processes to resemble each other so closely.
 We’ve heard Carl Sagan  describe how our bodies are literally made of stars. Now we are beginning to understand that our brains may be patterned like them as well. A whole universe of connections is in your mind – a universe within a universe – and one capable of reaching out to the other that gave rise to it. Billions of neurons touching billions of stars – surely spiritual.
title: 其中一张是大脑，另一张是宇宙。哪个是哪个？
title_en: One of These Pictures Is the Brain, the Other Is the Universe. Which Is Which?

note: 下载PDF摘要：这是对几何代数的介绍，它是传统矢量代数的替代方法，它以两种方式在其上进行扩展：1.除了标量和矢量之外，它还定义了表示任意维子空间的新对象。 2.它定义了一种受几何图形强烈驱动并且可以在任何两个对象之间进行测试的产品。例如，以一定方式获取的两个向量的乘积表示它们的公共平面。该系统是由威廉·克利福德（William Clifford）发明的，通常被称为克利福德代数。它实际上比我们今天使用的矢量代数更早（由于Gibbs），并将其作为子集包含在内。多年以来，许多需要Clifford代数的人独立地重新发明了Clifford代数的各个部分，但往往没有意识到所有这些部分都属于一个系统。这表明克利福德有正确的想法，并且几何代数，而不是我们今天使用的简化版本，应该成为标准的“矢量代数”。我在这些笔记中的目的是从这个角度描述几何代数并说明其有用性。笔记正在开发中；我将在自己学习新主题的同时不断添加新主题。
note_en: Download PDF  Abstract: This is an introduction to geometric algebra, an alternative to traditionalvector algebra that expands on it in two ways: 1. In addition to scalars and vectors, it defines new objects representingsubspaces of any dimension. 2. It defines a product that's strongly motivated by geometry and can betaken between any two objects. For example, the product of two vectors taken ina certain way represents their common plane. This system was invented by William Clifford and is more commonly known asClifford algebra. It's actually older than the vector algebra that we use today(due to Gibbs) and includes it as a subset. Over the years, various parts ofClifford algebra have been reinvented independently by many people who foundthey needed it, often not realizing that all those parts belonged in onesystem. This suggests that Clifford had the right idea, and that geometricalgebra, not the reduced version we use today, deserves to be the standard"vector algebra." My goal in these notes is to describe geometric algebra fromthat standpoint and illustrate its usefulness. The notes are work in progress;I'll keep adding new topics as I learn them myself.
